text:
The Medicare Encounter Outpatient file contains Medicare Advantage plan records from a variety of outpatient providers. Examples of institutional outpatient providers include hospital outpatient departments, rural health clinics, renal dialysis facilities, outpatient rehabilitation facilities, comprehensive outpatient rehabilitation facilities, Federally Qualified Health Centers and community mental health centers.
This file includes (variable highlights):
- Diagnosis (ICD diagnosis) codes
-
